world.title: Flipping photoredox selectivity with indiscriminate electron transfer
world.description: Mechanistic hack enables chemists to couple molecules that have mismatched reduction potentials

world.title: Exclusive: Officials asked to turn over phones at the White House as Wiles, Patel lead intensifying leak probe
world.description: Chief of staff Susie Wiles, President Donald Trump’s closest aide, and FBI Director Kash Patel helped personally orchestrate a sprawling investigation last week at the White House aimed at determining who in the government leaked information about the security deficiencies of a Qatari-gifted airplane meant to be used as Air Force One – with some officials being asked to turn over their phones to investigators on White House grounds, sources familiar with the matter told CNN.

world.title: Brain's immune cells put the brakes on out-of-control circuits in mouse model of Alzheimer's disease
world.description: Researchers at Trinity College Dublin have discovered that microglia—the main immune cells of the brain—play a critical role in maintaining the stability of neuronal networks in Alzheimer's disease. Crucially, this suggests treatments that indiscriminately suppress these cells could be counterproductive.

world.title: Religious ministry urges Umrah pilgrims to submit application through listed companies only
world.description: The Ministry of Religious Affairs on Wednesday urged intending Umrah pilgrims to submit their applications only through certified companies listed on the ministry's website, following the cabinet's approval of the new Umrah regulations.

world.title: Incidence of ischemic cardio-cerebrovascular disease rises among young women
world.description: Announcing a new article publication for Cardiovascular Innovations and Applications journal. The global burden, secular trends, and future projections of ischemic cardio-cerebrovascular disease (ICCVD), a composite indicator of ischemic heart disease (IHD) and ischemic stroke (IS), have not been specifically described in women.

world.title: Man Utd to bid £30m for Arsenal target to replace Marcus Rashford
world.description: Manchester United want to sign Crysencio Summerville from West Ham United this summer for £30million as a replacement for Marcus Rashford.

world.title: Tectonic forces may explain why Antarctica is covered in ice
world.description: Scientists uncovered how ancient tectonic activity reshaped Antarctica, setting the stage for its massive ice sheet millions of years later.
